name: review-auto
description: State-only multi-agent code review for auto workflows: parallel specialized reviewers -> consolidation -> workflow-state persistence with no PR dependency.
description_long: Comprehensive code review workflow for auto-mode slices that have not opened a PR. Dispatches specialized reviewers in parallel, consolidates findings, persists canonical review outputs into workflow state for downstream fix planning, and intentionally skips PR feedback posting.

steps.name: Review
steps.description: State-only auto review: parallel specialized reviewers -> consolidation -> state persistence
